description: TAMI AI is a B2B lead generation tool with real-time verified contact data, company insights, and CRM integrations.
overview: TAMI AI provides accurate global contact data and verified company insights in real time, helping teams build targeted lists and keep bounce rates low.
what_is: TAMI AI is a sales and marketing tool that provides accurate global contact data and verified company insights. Its real-time data refresh keeps contacts current and bounce rates low, helping teams find and reach ideal customers from one platform.

It is strongest for building targeted lead lists, analyzing competitor markets, and qualifying companies across industries, with real-time alerts on contact changes. TAMI AI integrates with major CRMs and marketing platforms for automatic enrichment, working as a lead and contact enrichment service rather than long-term storage or custom analytics.
